text_excerpt: Huntington's Disease Association Parliamentary Reception | Derbyniad Seneddol Cymdeithas Clefyd Huntington — Stephen Doughty MP 0 Skip to Content Stephen Doughty MP Home | Hafan Constituency | Etholaeth Parliament | San Steffan Events | Digwyddiadau Contact | Cyswllt About | Ynghylch Open Menu Close Menu Stephen Doughty MP Home | Hafan Constituency | Etholaeth Parliament | San Steffan Events | Digwyddiadau Contact | Cyswllt About | Ynghylch Open Menu Close Menu Home | Hafan Constituency | Etholaeth Parliament | San Steffan Events | Digwyddiadau Contact | Cyswllt About | Ynghylch Huntington's Disease Association Parliamentary Reception | Derbyniad Seneddol Cymdeithas Clefyd Huntington 19 Nov Written By Stephen Doughty It was a pleasure to attend the Huntington’s Disease Association Parliamentary Reception, and meet Professor Liam Gray. As Professor of Functional Neurosurgery at Cardiff University and Honorary Consultant Neurosurgeon at UHW, he presented his groundbreaking work in the delivery of gene therapies for Huntingdon's patients. ___ Roedd yn bleser mynychu Derbyniad Seneddol Cymdeithas Clefyd Huntington, a chwrdd â'r athro Liam Gray.
